summary: Comprehensive testing of ideaGround Early Discovery Bonus and Revenue Split features completed. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI correctly displays all new features including PLATINUM/GOLD/SILVER tier badges, 2.5x/2.0x/1.5x bonus multipliers, revenue distribution (50%/40%/10%), and early investor status on portfolio holdings.
passed_tests: Demo login endpoint returns user data with session_token
Video endpoint returns shares_sold_percent field
Video endpoint returns early_investor_tier (platinum/gold/silver/null)
Video endpoint returns early_bonus_available (2.5/2.0/1.5/1.0)
Video endpoint returns revenue_split with 50%/40%/10% breakdown
Buy shares endpoint returns is_early_investor boolean
Buy shares endpoint returns early_bonus_multiplier
Portfolio endpoint returns is_early_investor for each holding
Portfolio endpoint returns early_bonus_multiplier for each holding
Portfolio endpoint returns potential_bonus for each holding
Portfolio endpoint returns total_potential_bonus
Sell shares endpoint returns early_bonus_applied boolean
Sell shares endpoint returns bonus_earned amount
Sell shares endpoint returns bonus_multiplier
Landing page loads with custom logo
Dashboard displays videos, creators, market activity
Video player shows Early Discovery Bonus card with PLATINUM badge
Video player shows 2.5x bonus text for platinum tier
Video player shows Revenue Distribution card (50%/40%/10%)
Video player shows 'You're an Early Investor!' card when user owns shares
Buy shares dialog works and shows wallet balance
Buy shares success toast shows early investor bonus info
Portfolio shows 2.5x Bonus badge on early investor holdings
Portfolio shows Award icon on early investor holding thumbnails
Sell dialog shows 'You're an early investor! Profit bonus will be applied on sale.' message
All existing features continue to work (trending ticker, market simulation)
critical_code_review_comments: Early investor bonus calculation correctly applies only to profit portion (not full value)
Tier thresholds correctly implemented: <10% = platinum (2.5x), 10-20% = gold (2.0x), 20-30% = silver (1.5x), >30% = no bonus
Revenue split correctly shows Creator 50%, Shareholders 40%, Platform 10%
Portfolio correctly tracks and displays early investor status per holding

test_credentials.demo_login: POST /api/auth/demo-login creates test session with session_token cookie

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - 5 creators and 10 videos
context_for_next_testing_agent: Early Discovery Bonus and Revenue Split features fully implemented and tested. Video vid_67207373404a has <10% shares sold (PLATINUM tier with 2.5x bonus). Demo user has 7 shares of this video as early investor. Use POST /api/auth/demo-login to create authenticated sessions.

ui_elements: Early Discovery Bonus card on video player
You're an Early Investor card when user owns shares
Revenue Distribution card on video player
Early investor info in sell dialog
